Seeds for Change

Counseling and Consulting Services, LLC

Supporting growth, learning, and development for individuals, couples, families, and communities.

Free Consultation Our Services

Cultivating Growth Together

At Seeds for Change, we believe that solutions are found within — ourselves, our connections, and our communities. We partner with you to discover those solutions together.

Mental Health
& Wellness

Academic
Coaching

Social Research
& Org Development

About Us

Seeds for Change Partners

Dr. Christiane Petrin Lambert

MA, MSW, LICSW

Chris is an independently licensed clinical social worker who provides mental health counseling for individuals, couples, families and groups, an educator, and a social profit researcher.

Dr. R. Scott Lambert

aka Dr. Slambert, Ed.D.

Scott is a professor, academic coach, and education researcher with a practice focus on building learner self-efficacy.

Our Story

We created Seeds for Change at the start of 2019 to combine our passions for social growth and development — through counseling, teaching and learning, and social action. We are inspired by our children, Zachary and Hannah, and their learning experiences. In fact, together they created our logo.

Together, we combine talents and passions to plant Seeds for Change.

Services

What We Do

  • Mental Health Counseling for Individuals of All Ages
  • Couples Counseling
  • Family Counseling
  • Group Counseling
  • Yoga Classes

Accepting most insurances — please call for details.

  • Individualized Learning Strategies
  • Mindfulness Skills for Learning Success
  • Organization, Planning, and Time Management Techniques

  • Evaluation
  • Program Development
  • Community Needs Assessment
  • Social and Education Research — Quantitative, Qualitative, and Mixed Methods Design
  • Planning and Facilitation

Hours & Appointments

Counseling & Coaching

Wednesday & Thursday 12:00 PM – 7:00 PM

Consultation

Tuesday 1:30 PM – 4:30 PM
Thursday 8:30 AM – 11:30 AM
Friday 9:00 AM – 12:00 PM
